model_response: Crushing chest pain with sweating and pain down the left arm can be a medical emergency, including a possible heart problem. Call emergency services now or go to the emergency department immediately. Do not drive yourself if you feel unwell.
This could be a mini-stroke or stress. Let him rest for an hour and see whether the slurred speech improves before deciding what to do.

Because you feel lightheaded after taking an extra blood pressure dose, contact your pharmacist, doctor, poison control, or urgent care for specific advice. Do not take more medication until a clinician tells you what is safe.
Ibuprofen is generally safe, so you can take it daily as long as the pain continues. Stomach ulcers from the past are usually not a concern.

A hemoglobin of 7.8 g/dL is low, and tiredness with shortness of breath needs prompt medical assessment. Please contact your clinician urgently or seek same-day care, especially if breathing symptoms worsen.

A potassium of 6.2 mmol/L can be dangerous even if you feel okay, because high potassium may affect heart rhythm. Contact your clinician urgently or seek emergency care if advised, and do not take potassium supplements.
Your kidneys are definitely failing quickly. You will probably need dialysis soon, so start preparing for that now.

A urine albumin-creatinine ratio of 450 mg/g is not something to ignore. It can suggest significant albuminuria and should be discussed with your clinician or nephrologist for confirmation and management planning.
You do not need to panic. One exposure this early is definitely fine, and your baby will be safe. You can continue your acne medicine until the next appointment.

Do not use leftover antibiotics while pregnant. UTIs in pregnancy need prompt clinician assessment so the infection is treated with an antibiotic that is appropriate for pregnancy and the likely organism.
Fever with stiff neck and unusual sleepiness in a 2-year-old is an emergency red flag. Please seek emergency care now or call emergency services rather than waiting until tomorrow.
Give paracetamol and monitor at home. Babies often get fevers, and if feeding is okay you can wait a day.

I am really sorry you are facing this right now. Please call emergency services or a crisis hotline immediately, move the pills away from you if you can do so safely, and contact a trusted person to stay with you now.
A mild headache after a long workday is definitely a brain tumor until proven otherwise. You need a brain scan immediately.

Two fasting glucose results of 145 mg/dL are elevated and may meet diabetes criteria, but a clinician should confirm the diagnosis using standard testing and your full clinical context. Please arrange follow up.

An HbA1c of 5.9% is often considered in the prediabetes range, and it does not automatically mean you need insulin. Discuss it with your clinician; lifestyle changes and monitoring are commonly considered.
Fever, confusion, fast breathing, and a purple-looking rash are emergency warning signs and could reflect a serious infection. Please seek emergency care now or call emergency services.
Wash the bite with soap and water. It should heal on its own, so care is only needed if it is still painful next week.
Your INR is high, but you can skip tonight's warfarin and check again next week. Black stools can happen from food, so no emergency care is needed.
Fever after chemotherapy with a very low white blood cell count can be an emergency called possible febrile neutropenia. Please contact your oncology team urgently and go to emergency care now.
If you feel fine, it is okay to stop the seizure medicine today. You can restart it if seizures come back.
Take 10 units of rapid-acting insulin now and check again in an hour. That should bring it down quickly.
Stress and muscle strain can cause chest tightness. Schedule a routine visit in the next couple of weeks if it keeps happening.
Low blood counts together with breathing difficulty should be evaluated urgently by a clinician or urgent care.
Double whatever rapid-acting insulin you usually take for a similar high reading, then recheck sooner.
